overview: AgeRejuvenation is a functional medicine clinic offering hormone optimization, medical weight loss, peptide therapy, and IV therapy across 5 locations with nationwide virtual telehealth. They focus on personalized treatments addressing underlying causes of chronic health conditions.
highlights: 5 convenient locations plus nationwide virtual telehealth
Regenerative medicine including stem cell therapy, PRP, and shockwave therapy
Peptide protocols including BPC-157, TB-500, CJC-1295, GHK-Cu, and others
targetAudience: Adults seeking hormone optimization, weight loss management, or longevity-focused functional medicine care.
